settings.heading: How does personalization work?
settings.row_content: Choose the product, enter the personalization details requested on the product page, and review spelling carefully before checkout.

settings.heading: What materials are used?
settings.row_content: Material details must be confirmed by the supplier before launch. Until then, North & Pearl will not make claims such as sterling silver, gold vermeil, waterproof, nickel-free, or hypoallergenic.

settings.heading: How long will my order take?
settings.row_content: Production and shipping timelines will be finalized after supplier and fulfillment confirmation. Product pages will show the clearest available estimate before launch.

settings.heading: Can personalized items be returned?
settings.row_content: Custom products are generally non-returnable unless defective, damaged, or incorrect. Final policies require owner review before publishing.
